metadata.description: Public watchlist for Seedance 2.5 API availability and pricing. Official Seedance 2.5 API pricing has not been publicly published yet. Seedance 2.0 pricing may be used only as a temporary baseline, not as a forecast for Seedance 2.5 pricing.

methodology.pricing_policy: Only public pricing from official documentation, provider pages, or provider API pricing pages should be recorded as published pricing.
methodology.unpublished_policy: If no public Seedance 2.5 pricing is available, pricing_status must remain not_published and all price fields must remain null.
methodology.baseline_policy: Seedance 2.0 pricing may be used as a temporary budget reference but must not be treated as Seedance 2.5 pricing.
methodology.api_policy: API availability and pricing availability are tracked separately. A provider may list a model without publishing pricing, or publish pricing without full account-level API access.
methodology.source_policy: When a provider publishes pricing, source_url should point to the public pricing or documentation page used to verify the data.
methodology.affiliate_policy: Affiliate or sponsored links should not be used as source_url values. Source URLs should point to public provider documentation, pricing pages, or model pages.

availability_status.monitoring: Provider is being monitored for Seedance 2.5 availability.
availability_status.listed: Provider has publicly listed Seedance 2.5, but API access or pricing may still require verification.
availability_status.available: Provider publicly indicates Seedance 2.5 is available through API or production access.
availability_status.not_available: Provider publicly indicates Seedance 2.5 is not available.

api_status.not_confirmed: No public API access confirmation has been recorded.
api_status.listed_but_unverified: The model appears in public material, but API access should be verified.
api_status.available: Public documentation or provider page indicates API access is available.
api_status.restricted: API access may require account approval, region access, allowlist, or console verification.

pricing_status.not_published: No public Seedance 2.5 pricing has been recorded.
pricing_status.starting_price_published: Provider publishes a starting price or provider-dependent price.
pricing_status.published: Provider publishes a fixed or clearly defined public price.
pricing_status.estimated: Provider publishes an estimated price, but billing may depend on usage, tokens, credits, resolution, or duration.

confidence.pending_public_source: No public source has confirmed Seedance 2.5 pricing yet.
confidence.public_provider_source: Pricing or availability is supported by a public provider page.
confidence.official_source: Pricing or availability is supported by official BytePlus, Volcengine, or ByteDance documentation.
confidence.provider_dependent: Pricing depends on provider routing, account settings, model tier, or non-fixed billing.

providers.notes: Official Seedance 2.5 API pricing has not been publicly published yet. Availability and pricing should be verified through official BytePlus / Volcengine documentation or console before production use.
No public Seedance 2.5 listing or pricing has been recorded for OpenRouter yet.
No public Seedance 2.5 listing or pricing has been recorded for fal.ai yet.
No public Seedance 2.5 listing or pricing has been recorded for PiAPI yet.
No public Seedance 2.5 listing or pricing has been recorded for Kie.ai yet.
No public Seedance 2.5 listing or pricing has been recorded for EvoLink yet.

disclaimer.independence: This dataset is independently maintained and is not affiliated with ByteDance, Volcengine, BytePlus, or any third-party API provider.
disclaimer.pricing_accuracy: Pricing can change at any time. Always verify current pricing and API availability on the provider's official page before making production decisions.
disclaimer.no_prediction: This dataset does not predict Seedance 2.5 pricing. Unpublished pricing is intentionally represented as null.
